signals.headline: 𝕏 Money Launch by April 30
signals.raw:
𝕏 Money Launch by April 30? Traders Eyeing Elon Musk's Crypto Move | NO | MED confidence**  
Polymarket's X predictions highlight "𝕏 Money launched by April 30?" at 12% YES odds with $33.6K volume, drawing trader focus amid Elon Musk tech bets.[2] Related markets like "Nikita Bier out as Head of Product at X by June 30?" sit at 7% YES ($1.4K volume), signaling low conviction on X shifts.[2]
